// @ts-ignore TS6133 import { expect, test } from "vitest"; import * as z from "zod/v3"; test("object augmentation", () => { const Animal = z .object({ species: z.string(), }) .augment({ population: z.number(), }); // overwrites `species` const ModifiedAnimal = Animal.augment({ species: z.array(z.string()), }); ModifiedAnimal.parse({ species: ["asd"], population: 1324, }); const bad = () => ModifiedAnimal.parse({ species: "asdf", population: 1324, } as any); expect(bad).toThrow(); });
